info.name: Advanced Product Search API
info.description: Relevance-ranked product search with filtering, faceting, autocomplete and query suggestions. The `baseUrl` collection variable points at the live deployment, so the requests run as imported; set it to http://localhost:3000 to hit a local instance. The deployment uses Render's free instance type and spins down when idle, so the first request after a pause can take up to a minute.

request.description: Service name, version and the list of available endpoints.

response.name: 200 OK

originalRequest.description: Service name, version and the list of available endpoints.

response.body: {"name":"Advanced Product Search API","version":"0.1.0","endpoints":{"GET /search":"Relevance-ranked search with filters, facets and low-recall suggestions","GET /autocomplete":"Type-ahead product-name completions","GET /suggest":"Did-you-mean correction and related queries","GET /health":"Dependency health (Elasticsearch critical, Redis non-critical)"},"docs":"https://github.com/ROMEROLUIS15/advanced-search-api"}

response.name: 200 OK
